assumption_text: The 6 October city-core civilian node is approximated at 2,000/2,500/3,000 persons from reporting that more than 2,000 were being evacuated, combined with the later observation that only a few hundred remained.
rationale: The source gives a clean evacuation count but not a simultaneous in-town census, so a bounded opening node is needed for person-month integration.

assumption_text: Civilian exposure between 6 October, 8 October, 15 October, and 27 January is interpolated linearly.
rationale: No denser city-core resident time series was located.

assumption_text: October fatality breakdowns from SOHR/VOA are treated as partial month-one evidence and are not extrapolated to the full episode.
rationale: The source itself warns that overall casualty totals may be much higher and only covers the early phase of the siege.

assumption_text: No combatant person-month estimate is produced because city-bounded exposure for ISIS, Kurdish defenders, and coalition-linked strike support is not defensibly observed over time.
rationale: Avoids importing broader regional force levels into a town-core episode.

assumption_text: Regional refugee totals in Turkey are retained as context but excluded from the town-core civilian denominator.
rationale: The prompt explicitly forbids denominator leakage from larger theaters into bounded city episodes.
